v.t_pr_w = query.movement_direction(2) >= 0.1 && query.movement_direction(2) > math.abs(query.movement_direction(0)) || (v.wasd && math.abs(query.position_delta(2)) - math.abs(query.position_delta(0)) <= 6) ? 1.0 : 0.0;

v.t_pr_rotation = (query.camera_rotation(1) > -45 && query.camera_rotation(1) <= 0 ? {return v.t_pr_rotation = 0;}; query.camera_rotation(1) < -45 && query.camera_rotation(1) > -135 ? {return v.t_pr_rotation = 90;}; query.camera_rotation(1) < -135 && (query.camera_rotation(1) > -180 || query.camera_rotation(1) < 180) ? {return v.t_pr_rotation = 180;}; query.camera_rotation(1) > 0 && query.camera_rotation(1) < 45 ? {return v.t_pr_rotation = 0;}; query.camera_rotation(1) > 45 && query.camera_rotation(1) < 135 ? {return v.t_pr_rotation = -90;}; query.camera_rotation(1) > 135 && (query.camera_rotation(1) > -180 || query.camera_rotation(1) < 180) ? {return v.t_pr_rotation = -180;}; );
